scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/opentui-web build && bun run --cwd packages/opentui-ui build && bun run --cwd packages/opentui-testing build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/opentui-web test && bun run --cwd packages/opentui-ui test && bun run --cwd packages/opentui-testing test
scripts.test:ci: bun run --cwd packages/opentui-web test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/opentui-ui test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/opentui-testing test --randomize --rerun-each 3
